cast.name: 马丁·斯科塞斯 Martin Scorsese

this_title: Martin Scorsese Presents: The Saints Season 2
introduction: Martin Scorsese will be back to tell more saintly tales. Fox Nation said today that the Oscar-winning filmmaker is returning for Season 2 of its docudrama series Martin Scorsese Presents: The Saints, whose eight episodes will begin in November.“For many years, I dreamed of telling stories of the lives of the saints,” said Scorsese, who hosts, narrates and executive produces the series. “It’s been an obsession of mine for as long as I can remember. So the chance to do this series meant the world to me, and it’s heartening to know that people have responded to it. I’m very excited to be coming back for a second season.”
foreign_title: Martin Scorsese Presents: The Saints Season 2
